message:
feat(tests): add 15 new enrichment integration test suites for planning track, hostcall telemetry, and specialized subsystems

New test suites covering recently added or expanded engine subsystems:

- rgc_planning_track_integration: validates planning-track aggregate
  contract artifact emission, deterministic replay, and wave handoff
- rgc_planning_track_enrichment_integration: enrichment property tests
  for the planning track module
- benchmark_behavior_equivalence, checkpoint, distribution_shift_monitor,
  frx_lockstep_oracle, galaxy_brain_explainability, hostcall_telemetry,
  metadata_substrate_optimized, novelty_synthesis_engine,
  parser_error_recovery, react_specialization_benchmark_gate,
  regexp_string_governance, test262_release_gate, trust_card:
  enrichment integration suites with property-based and edge-case
  coverage for each respective subsystem

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
